summary: Techniques System Testing Complete - Backend 27/27 tests passed (100%), Frontend UI fully functional. All public endpoints, admin create with auth/validation, and MongoDB indexes verified.
critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB _id properly excluded from responses using projection {'_id': 0}
Slug uniqueness enforced via MongoDB unique index and 409 response on duplicates
Admin auth correctly checks user.role == 'admin' after get_session_user()
Pydantic validation working: title min/max length, readTime gt=0, difficulty enum, sections min_length=1
Auto-slug generation uses _slugify() function with proper regex transformations
seed_data_creation: Created testregular@example.com user (role=user) for 403 auth testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Techniques system complete. Existing techniques: 'knife-skills-fundamentals' (published, Beginner), 'sauce-making-basics' (published, Intermediate). Test techniques with TEST_ prefix created during testing. Admin credentials: admin@souschef.com / admin123. Regular user: testregular@example.com / testpass123. MongoDB indexes verified: slug_1 (unique), status_1, category_1.
verified_features: GET /api/techniques returns flat JSON array of published techniques
GET /api/techniques returns techniques sorted by created_at descending (newest first)
GET /api/techniques returns all required fields: title, slug, category, difficulty, readTime, introduction, sections
GET /api/techniques/{slug} returns single published technique with all fields
GET /api/techniques/{slug} returns 404 for draft technique (not publicly visible)
POST /api/admin/techniques returns 403 when authenticated as non-admin user
POST /api/admin/techniques creates technique with admin auth and returns document
POST /api/admin/techniques auto-generates slug from title when slug not provided
POST /api/admin/techniques defaults status to 'draft' when not specified
MongoDB indexes exist: slug_1 (unique), status_1, category_1
Frontend renders published techniques with title, category, difficulty, readTime, introduction, sections

backend_techniques_api.TestPublicTechniquesEndpoints: 8/8 passed - list (array, sorted, published only, fields), single (by slug, 404, excludes _id)
backend_techniques_api.TestAdminTechniquesCreate: 5/5 passed - create, auto-slug, draft default, custom status, duplicate 409
backend_techniques_api.TestTechniquesValidation: 7/7 passed - title min/max, empty sections, readTime 0/negative, invalid/valid difficulty
backend_techniques_api.TestMongoDBIndexes: 1/1 passed - slug unique index prevents duplicates
backend_techniques_api.TestDraftTechniqueNotPubliclyVisible: 2/2 passed - draft not in list, draft 404 on direct access

frontend_techniques_ui.Technique articles: PASS - All published techniques rendered as articles
frontend_techniques_ui.Metadata display: PASS - 'category • difficulty • readTime min read' format shown
frontend_techniques_ui.Sections: PASS - Technique sections with titles and content displayed
